Notice Of Motion To Compel The Production Of Pltf'S Cellphone Records And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

JOHN W. RANUCCI, ESQ. for defendant and moving party: JEREMY HULSE, HERTZ VEHICLES LLC

JOOING Y. IM, ESQ. for Atty. for plaintiff and opposing party: MIN CHA JO.

AFTER ARGUMENT, THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS JEREMY HULSE and HERTZ VEHICLES LLC'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Plaintiff's Cell Phone Records is denied as untimely brought as it was not brought at least 15 days before the original trial date. Late opposition has been considered. Late reply has been considered. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
